name: Furkan Baytekin
bio: Furkan is the older brother. Works as a Software Specialist. He's enthusiastic about coding, loves Godot, and used Game Maker Studio for years. He's known for bringing electric guitar, bass guitar, and MIDI keyboard to game jams. He works in music, sound effects, general game design, coding, 2D drawing, and pixel art, as well as taking on tasks like creating teasers for game releases. He's not great at anything, but he has a basic understanding of everything.

name: Enes Baytekin
bio: Enes is the younger brother. He works as Server Admin. He jumps into every part of production just like his older brother — code, 2D art, music, game design, and animations. He's known for bringing magic tricks to game jams. He's also not great at anything, but he has a basic understanding of everything.
